briefdescription.para: WdtInstance is an instance of external WDT used for GPIO toggling.
This function enables the WDT and sets NodeId and periodicity.

detaileddescription.para:
NodeId
NodeId is the MIO node to be used by PLM for toggling.
Periodicity
at which MIO value should be toggled.
XST_SUCCESS if success.
XPLMI_ERR_WDT_PERIODICITY on invalid Periodicity.
XPLMI_ERR_WDT_LPD_NOT_INITIALIZED if LPD is not initialized.
XPLMI_ERR_WDT_NODE_ID on invalid node ID.
It also verifies the parameters.

parameterdescription.para: NodeId is the MIO node to be used by PLM for toggling.
at which MIO value should be toggled.

listitem.para: XPLMI_ERR_WDT_LPD_NOT_INITIALIZED if LPD is not initialized.

parameterdescription.para: NodeId is the MIO node to be used by PLM for toggling.
at which MIO value should be toggled.

listitem.para: XPLMI_ERR_PMC_WDT_NOT_ENABLED if PMC WDT is tried use and it is not enabled in design.
XPLMI_ERR_PMC_WDT_DRV_INIT if PMC WDT driver initialization fails.
XPLMI_ERR_WDT_LPD_NOT_INITIALIZED if LPD is not initialized.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the default WDT configuration if the wdt is not enabled and ROM SWDT usage bit is enabled in EFUSE.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: This is required when LPD is powered down and if LPD MIO is used. Also required when debugging.

NodeId
is not applicable for versal platform.
This is required when LPD is powered down and if LPD MIO is used. Also required when debugging.

parameterdescription.para: is the Node ID of external WDT or internal PMC WDT
is the Node ID of external WDT or internal PMC WDT

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the PLM Status.
This function clears the PLM status.
This function is used to refresh WDT before timeout.

parameterdescription.para: is the Node ID of external WDT or internal PMC WDT

inbodydescription.para: if WDT is not enabled, just return
Toggle MIO only when last reset period exceeds periodicity

briefdescription.para: This function is used to kick the WDT.

parameterdescription.para: is the Node ID of external WDT or internal PMC WDT

briefdescription.para: This function is used to restore wdt after the In-Place PLM Update.
This function is handler for WDT.

detaileddescription.para: Scheduler calls this function periodically to check the PLM Live status and to toggle the MIO.

listitem.para: if WDT is not enabled, just return
Toggle MIO only when last reset period exceeds periodicity
if WDT is not enabled, just return
Toggle MIO only when last reset period exceeds periodicity
